segments.text: Vindicate me, O Lord, for I have walked in my integrity, and I have trusted in the Lord without wavering.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Prove me, O Lord, and try me; test my heart and my mind.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For your steadfast love is before my eyes, and I walk in your faithfulness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I do not sit with men of falsehood, nor do I consort with hypocrites.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I hate the assembly of evildoers, and I will not sit with the wicked.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I wash my hands in innocence and go around your altar, O Lord,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: proclaiming thanksgiving aloud, and telling all your wondrous deeds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord, I love the habitation of your house and the place where your glory dwells.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: where…: Heb. of the tabernacle of thy honour

segments.text: Do not sweep my soul away with sinners, nor my life with bloody men,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: in whose hands are evil devices, and whose right hands are full of bribes.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But as for me, I shall walk in my integrity; redeem me, and be gracious to me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My foot stands on level ground; in the great assembly I will bless the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
